titles.title: 'Tis So Sweet To Trust In Jesus

properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5 C2

verse.name: V1
C2
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, how I trust Him! How I've proved Him o'er and o'er! Jesus, Jesus, precious Jesus! Oh, for grace to trust Him more!

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Oh, how sweet to trust in Jesus Just to trust His cleansing blood; Just in simple faith to plunge me 'Neath the healing, cleansing flood.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Yes, 'tis sweet to trust in Jesus Just from sin and self to cease; Just from Jesus simply taking Life and rest, and joy and peace.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I'm so glad I learned to trust Thee! Precious Jesus, Savior, Friend; And I know that Thou art with me, Wilt be with me to the end.
